name: pavitas-plugins
description: Custom plugin suite for Pavitas Productions LLC

plugins.name: audiobook-production
plugins.description: End-to-end audiobook production: script analysis, recording prep, QC, delivery, invoicing

plugins.name: daily-ops
plugins.description: Daily workflow orchestration: briefings, handoffs, email triage, task capture, day reviews

plugins.name: creative-writing
plugins.description: Story Grid fiction toolkit: scene analysis, mentor submissions, prose cleaning, dictation processing

plugins.name: pavitas-content
plugins.description: Weekly Pavitas Productions social content generation (IG/FB post + TikTok/Shorts script) from Notion inputs

plugins.name: spins-yarns-content
plugins.description: @pavi.spins.yarns content + craft docs (Instagram only): weekly drop (2 IG posts from Notion inputs, Canva assets), one-off post drafting, pattern transcription, project logs/tracking

plugins.name: pavitas-core
plugins.description: Core skill architecture: router, constraints (safety-rails, workspace-context, output-quality), orchestrators (morning-review, audiobook-kickoff, story-session, content-pipeline, infra-session), handoff, decision-framework, proof, using-slashy

plugins.name: slashy-ops
plugins.description: Email and calendar operations on Slashy MCP: morning email brief, EOD wrapup, batch draft writing, meeting scheduling, deal/relationship tracking. Requires pavitas-core for using-slashy mechanics.

plugins.name: story-grid-skills
plugins.description: Story Grid beat-writing mentorship coaching: mock grading against the real examiner's bar, Socratic line-editing, drill-worksheet generation, brainstorming/pressure-testing, and knowledge-base sync.
